excerpt: **Published:** February 13, 2026 **Author:** Hextech Analytics Team **Meta Window:** Week 0 (Launch Day - February 20)
Week 0 is when everyone's guessing and nobody has real data.

This is your opportunity window. While slower players netdeck Origins lists or wait for "the meta to settle," you can leverage information asymmetry. Week 0 rewards prep work and finding power before consensus forms.
Spiritforged launches today with three new mechanics (Equip, Gold tokens, Repeat), 12 new Champion Legends, and major changes to how permanents work through equipment.
**The question isn't "what's the best deck?" It's "what punishes unprepared opponents hardest?"**
Spiritforged's core innovation is simple: units can now equip permanent gear attachments via the Equip keyword.

**What this means tactically:** - Single-target removal loses value when units carry equipment value on death - Board wipes become better since clearing equipped units generates massive tempo swings - Equipment-light decks gain speed but sacrifice late-game power - Equipment-heav
**Early read:** Week 0 meta will probably skew aggressive.
Gold tokens introduce an alternative resource system outside traditional Domain mana curves.

**Immediate applications:** - Ramp strategies gain flexibility (Domain mana + Gold generation) - Economic advantage decks can exist in colors that couldn't support it before - Late-game inevitability without needing Domain-specific payoffs
